headline: US-China AI race: one goal, two very different approaches
summary: Investing.com -- Artificial intelligence investment is positioned to remain a central pillar of global economic expansion through 2026, according to a new macro analysis from BofA Global Research. headline: Nvidia Senate Questions Put Groq Deal And AI Stack Power In Focus
summary: Nvidia (NasdaqGS:NVDA) is facing questions in the U.S. Senate over a US$20b licensing agreement with AI startup Groq. The inquiry focuses on Nvidia's role in the AI stack and potential concentration of power in key infrastructure. Senators have requested information directly from CEO Jensen Huang, signaling closer scrutiny of the company's AI partnerships and...
